description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a modern, open layout and a flat roof. The structure features extensive wooden paneling on the exterior, complemented by large glass windows and sliding doors that provide ample natural light. A spacious outdoor deck surrounds the house, leading to a rectangular swimming pool and a paved patio area with outdoor furniture. The property includes a detached garage with a sloped roof and is landscaped with a mix of deciduous and coniferous trees. The interior appears to be open-plan, with visible living, dining, and kitchen areas, as well as multiple entry points. The overall design emphasizes outdoor living and seamless integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, wooden exterior, large windows, a pool, and landscaped grounds.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, wooden facade, detached garage, and surrounding trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the outdoor deck, pool, and patio area with visible outdoor furniture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, patio, and back facade with large windows and sliding doors.
description_view_3: Angled view emphasizing the pool, deck, and open-plan interior layout with visible living spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding doors
